item.title: F-003e: Source Toggle with Cursor Mapping
item.intent: Switching between rich and source view must preserve context — the user should land on the same paragraph, not the top of the document
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-003 (Core Rendering), FEAT-038 (Parser). Toggle button in toolbar switches between rich text view and raw markdown source view. Cursor position maps between views using AST source positions — same paragraph, best-effort same line. Changes made in source view are reflected when returning to rich view (re-parse and re-render). Toggle latency (tap to first frame of new view) under 50ms excluding The Render animation. The Render animation (FEAT-014) triggers on this toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggling from rich to source shows raw markdown with cursor at the corresponding line
Toggling from source to rich shows styled view with cursor at the corresponding paragraph
Edits in source view are correctly reflected when toggling back to rich view
Toggle works correctly on an empty document
